---
title: "01. No11 与知止之美"
subtitle: "No11 and the Beauty of Knowing When to Stop"
date: 2026-04-10
order: 1
categories: [synthesis, cultural, omega]
description: "Cross-text synthesis essay tracing `fibonacci_cardinality` across 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本."
---

**主定理核 / Primary Lean Anchor:** `fibonacci_cardinality`  
**覆盖文本 / Works:** 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本

{{< include articles/synthesis_01_no11_golden_mean_shift.md >}}

---

[Back to Synthesis Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
